title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat Web Terminal Operator 1.15.0 release.
overview: Red Hat Web Terminal Operator 1.15.0 has been released.
description: The Web Terminal provides a way to access a fully in-browser terminal emulator within the OpenShift Console. Command-line tools for interacting with the OpenShift cluster are pre-installed.
full_text:
Red Hat Web Terminal Operator 1.15.0 has been released.

The Web Terminal provides a way to access a fully in-browser terminal emulator within the OpenShift Console. Command-line tools for interacting with the OpenShift cluster are pre-installed.
